rulings.Case Title: TERANCE BAGBY et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, A PUBLIC ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 05, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Fourth Amended Complaint DENIED. Plaintiff alleged sufficient facts in the totality to support punitive damage claim at this stage of procedings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONNIE Y CHAN VS. MARS ELLIOT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 05, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF CONNIE CHAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant DENIED as moot because requested discovery has been provided. Hearing required on request for sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. PATRICIA TELLERIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendants; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 05, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANTS PATRICIA TELLERIA, DEYSIS BERMUDEZ and EDUARDO ALVARADO's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Defendants; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities DENIED in so far as it is a Delta Motion to Quash and this Court follows Borsuk v. Appellate Division of the Superior Court (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. The Court DENIES Defendants' Motion as to the other grounds in that Plaintiff complied sufficiently with CCP § 446. = (501/REQ)
